revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23176857634|manual triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Comma_separated_entries%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-risk|150000}} {{Lua|Module:Separated entries}} {{Template shortcut|csv}} This template is used primarily in infoboxes to create a comma-delimited collection of items, only adding the commas where needed. For lists of items, without bullets, use {{tl|plainlist}}. == Usage == Typing: :{{comma separated entries|entry1|entry2|entry3|entry4|entry5|...}} Results in: :{{comma separated entries|entry1|entry2|entry3|entry4|entry5|...}} == Example == {| class="wikitable plainrowheaders" |+{{sronly|Examples}} |- !scope="col" | Code !scope="col" | Result |- | {{comma separated entries|entry1|entry2|entry3|entry4}} || {{comma separated entries|entry1|entry2|entry3|entry4}} |- | {{comma separated entries| |entry2|entry3|entry4}} || {{comma separated entries| |entry2|entry3|entry4}} |- | {{comma separated entries|entry1| |entry3|entry4}} || {{comma separated entries|entry1| |entry3|entry4}} |- | {{comma separated entries|entry1|entry2| |entry4}} || {{comma separated entries|entry1|entry2| |entry4}} |- | {{comma separated entries|entry1|entry2|entry3| }} || {{comma separated entries|entry1|entry2|entry3| }} |- | {{comma separated entries|entry1| | | }} || {{comma separated entries|entry1| | | }} |- | {{comma separated entries| |entry2| | }} || {{comma separated entries| |entry2| | }} |- | {{comma separated entries| | |entry3| }} || {{comma separated entries| | |entry3| }} |- | {{comma separated entries| | | |entry4}} || {{comma separated entries| | | |entry4}} |- | {{comma separated entries|entry1|entry2}} || {{comma separated entries|entry1|entry2}} |- | {{comma separated entries| | | | }} || {{comma separated entries| | | | }} |- | {{comma separated entries|entry1|entry2|entry3|entry4|entry5|entry6}} || {{comma separated entries|entry1|entry2|entry3|entry4|entry5|entry6}} |} == TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} {{#invoke:TNT|doc|Separated entries}} == See also == * {{tl|br separated entries}} (displays a list with an item per line) * {{tl|plainlist}} (same as above, but using regular unordered list markup) * {{tl|flatlist}} (converts a regular unordered list into an inline list separated by interpuncts) * {{tl|pagelist}} (formats a list of internal links as prose, using commas or "and" when appropriate) * {{tl|prose list}} (formats a list using commas and "and" before the last item) * {{tl|Catalog lookup link}} * [[Module:Separated entries]], the Lua module used to realize this template. {{basepage subpage| }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:List formatting and function templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
